name: Linx Security
oneliner: AI-first identity security and governance platform that continuously maps, monitors, and auto-remediates access risks across every identity — human, machine, and AI agent.
finserv: Banks and healthcare companies confirmed as multimillion-dollar contract customers; governing millions of identities in production. Positioned as 'Wiz for identity'.
team: Israel Duanis and Niv Goldenberg, 25+ years combined at Check Point, Microsoft, Transmit. Wiz founders as angels. Backed by Insight Partners, Index Ventures, Cyberstarts.
thesis: The most finserv-validated NHI/agent identity company after Oasis — already governs millions of identities at live banks with multimillion-dollar contracts. Series B with institutional finserv customers: the window for partnership is now.
